owner_operator_stated: Named entity 'Palatine New Age Dental' is CLOSED (per Yelp). The address/phone now belong to a different, unrelated practice: Lanson Dental Palatine, owned by Dr. Lisa Lee (Lisa Yu-jin Lee), DDS.
notes: Named entity 'Palatine New Age Dental' is marked CLOSED on Yelp. The exact address (2201 Plum Grove Rd Ste B) and exact phone (847) 397-5868 now belong to Lanson Dental Palatine, an unrelated dental practice owned by Dr. Lisa Lee, established 2014. Vendor hint (Lansondentalpalatine.com) correctly identified this successor site, but it is NOT the named entity.

owner_operator_stated: Named entity 'Dr. Hugo F. Bertagni DDS' practices at 600 N North Ct, Suite 140, phone (847) 991-2680 (per WebMD) -- a different phone than the record. The record's phone (847) 991-4663 belongs to a different practice in the same building, Suite 250: Palatine Pediatric Dentistry, reportedly led by Dr. Irwin Seidman.
notes: Vendor hint (Palatinepediatricdentist.com) resolves to a DIFFERENT practice than the named entity. Hugo Bertagni DDS's confirmed real number is (847) 991-2680 at Suite 140; the record's phone (847) 991-4663 belongs to Palatine Pediatric Dentistry at Suite 250 in the same 600 N North Ct building -- two separate practices sharing a building, not a rebrand of one into the other. Direct WebFetch of palatinepediatricdentist.com pages failed (TLS/403 errors); the 'Dr. Irwin Seidman' detail is from WebSearch snippets only and was NOT placed in doctors[] since it could not be independently confirmed on a loaded page.

Practice operates publicly as 'Plum Grove Dental Center' (legal entity 'Plum Grove Dental Associates Ltd.' per LinkedIn), matching record name/address/phone exactly (222 N Plum Grove Rd, (847) 359-4700). Vendor hint 'Arlington-Endodontics.com' was unrelated and ignored. Checked homepage and a guessed /careers/ URL (404) -- no hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Named entity 'Robert C. Poulsom, DDS, MS Ltd' (periodontist) has a confirmed real phone of (847) 825-7447 at Suite 120 in this building (per Healthgrades) -- different from the record's phone. Fitzgerald, Przybylo, Atassi, Gilbert, and Rojas -- none of whom is Poulsom.
notes: Vendor hint 'Omsparkridge.com' did not resolve to a relevant match. Both Poulsom (Suite 120) and Northwest Dental Specialists (Suite 116) occupy 350 S Northwest Hwy, Park Ridge but are separate, unrelated periodontics practices. Record's phone corroborates the WRONG entity for the named practice -- treated as ownership_conflict.

owner_operator_stated: Practice now publicly operates as 'Precision Oral Surgery and Implants' at the same address/phone as the record's named entity. Two of the four originally-named partners (Barry Cherny, Leo Dumanis) remain active; Bruce Hochstadter and Richard Isaacson (also named in the record entity) are now listed as DDS Emeritus, alongside newer surgeons Amit Patel and Ajay Koya.
notes: Oral & maxillofacial surgery specialist group, not a GP. Rebranded from 'Hochstadter, Isaacson, Cherny, Dumanis & Associates' to 'Precision Oral Surgery and Implants' at the SAME address (444 N Northwest Hwy Ste 325) and phone (847-296-6100) -- continuity of the same entity, not a takeover, since 2 named partners remain active and 2 are emeritus. Multi-location group (Highland Park, Skokie, Park Ridge, Buffalo Grove). Direct WebFetch of precisionosi.com pages returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked); doctor/contact facts are sourced from WebSearch result snippets referencing those pages, not independently loaded page content. Vendor hint 'Doctors.Advocatehealth.com' did not match and was ignored.
